column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, standing in front of a greenhouse, holding an empty small basket, eyes sparkling" | TEXT="ついに来た" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, doing warm-up stretches outside the field, serious face" | TEXT="準備運動" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, peeking into the greenhouse, drooling slightly looking at red strawberries" | TEXT="たまらん" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, marching confidently with a determined expression towards the strawberry rows" | TEXT="いざ出陣" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, gasping in amazement at the endless rows of red strawberries" | TEXT="楽園か" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, carefully examining a leaf like a professional inspector" | TEXT="プロの目" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, receiving a paper cup for condensed milk, bowing politely" | TEXT="いただきます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding up the cup of condensed milk like it's a holy grail" | TEXT="神の液" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, licking lips, staring intensely at a massive red strawberry" | TEXT="ロックオン"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, taking a huge bite of a strawberry, eyes clenched in extreme joy" | TEXT="甘いっ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dipping a giant strawberry heavily into thick white condensed milk" | TEXT="たっぷりつける" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, with condensed milk smeared around his mouth, looking perfectly happy" | TEXT="幸せすぎる" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a half-eaten bright red strawberry close to the camera, offering it" | TEXT="食べる" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dramatically crying tears of joy while chewing a perfect strawberry" | TEXT="生きててよかった" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, posing like a model while delicately holding a small strawberry" | TEXT="優雅に" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, eating three strawberries at once, cheeks bulging like a chipmunk" | TEXT="欲張り" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking surprised holding a strangely shaped double strawberry" | TEXT="レアだ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, giving a double thumbs up with strawberry juice on hands" | TEXT="最高評価"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pointing a finger at a new row of strawberries, looking competitive" | TEXT="次はあっちだ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, rapidly picking strawberries like a machine, blur of hands" | TEXT="収穫マシーン" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, undoing the belt of his tights to fit more food in his stomach" | TEXT="まだまだ入る" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sweating profusely, staring down a giant strawberry like an opponent" | TEXT="負けられない" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, chugging condensed milk straight from the paper cup, reckless" | TEXT="味変" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding standard large strawberries in both hands, comparing sizes" | TEXT="どっちがデカい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, moving stealthily like a ninja under the leaves to find hidden huge strawberries" | TEXT="お宝発見" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, burping lightly, politely covering his mouth, looking a bit full" | TEXT="失礼" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking extremely full, belly sticking out visibly from the tights" | TEXT="限界かも"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, accidentally dropping a perfectly ripe coated strawberry on the floor, shocked face" | TEXT="あああっ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, squeezing a overripe strawberry too hard, red juice squirting onto his face" | TEXT="やっちまった" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, getting chased by a confused angry bee inside the greenhouse" | TEXT="逃げろ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, stepping softly avoiding vines, but losing balance like on a tightrope" | TEXT="おっとっと" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking devastated as his condensed milk cup falls over, spilling it" | TEXT="嘘だろ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, biting into a visually perfect strawberry but making a sour face, it's not sweet" | TEXT="酸っぱい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, clothes getting caught on a thorny vine, trying to free himself gently" | TEXT="引っかかった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, reaching high for a strawberry, groaning as his back cracks or cramps" | TEXT="腰が" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, checking a watch and realizing time limit is 5 minutes left, panicking" | TEXT="時間がない"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, offering a beautiful perfect strawberry like a ring proposal" | TEXT="どうぞ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, apologizing gracefully holding a basket of strawberries as a peace offering" | TEXT="ごめんね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a strawberry up like a microphone to speak" | TEXT="聞いてください" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, winking holding a strawberry near his eye" | TEXT="よろしく" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, making an X sign crossed arms with strawberries in both hands" | TEXT="ダメ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, raising a strawberry high like a toast" | TEXT="お疲れ様" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pointing to his rounded full belly proudly" | TEXT="大満足です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, waving a strawberry goodbye" | TEXT="またね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, doing an ok sign with his fingers holding a small strawberry" | TEXT="了解"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, crawling out of the greenhouse on all fours, completely stuffed, defeated but happy" | TEXT="もう食えん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, wiping a tear from his eye, looking back at the greenhouse affectionately" | TEXT="名残惜しい" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, buying an expensive pack of souvenir strawberries at the register, throwing money" | TEXT="お持ち帰り" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sleeping on the train ride home, dreaming with a strawberry bubble thought" | TEXT="夢に出る" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking at the bathroom scale, shocked at the weight gain from strawberries" | TEXT="増えてる" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, brushing his teeth aggressively realizing his teeth are red from berries" | TEXT="真っ赤だ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sighing happily looking at photos of the strawberry picking on his phone" | TEXT="余韻" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a stomach pump pose, still feeling very full hours later" | TEXT="まだ苦しい" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, striking a heroic pose vowing to return next year" | TEXT="来年リベンジ"
